metadata.description: All-in-one multi-agent orchestration for Claude Code — 53 core agents always loaded + 150 domain agent-packs on demand, 156 skills, 65 rules, 4 hooks, 3 MCP servers. Bundles agency-agents, everything-claude-code, and oh-my-claudecode with weekly CI auto-sync.

plugins.name: my-claude
plugins.description: 53 core agents always loaded + 150 domain agent-packs on demand (Boss orchestrator, Hephaestus autonomous worker, agency specialists, OMC agents), 156 skills, 65 rules, behavioral correction hooks, and MCP servers (Context7, Exa, grep.app)
